justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all of the user's time preferences throughout the conversation.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent consistently reported unavailability and offered to check other dates, but did not proactively suggest alternative times or dates within the same turn until the very end.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent made a slightly redundant API call by checking for 'afternoon' availability on Friday, June 5th, after already checking for 'morning' availability on the same day.
justifications.customer_experience: The conversation felt a bit tiring due to the repeated apologies and the agent's inability to proactively suggest alternative times, leading to a prolonged back-and-forth.
